name: Racing RPG
description:
Will be making a Lorebook for Cars, why a lorebook? Well, you see it's easier to organise and find the specific car I might have messed up

A Racing RPG with Both Sci-Fi and regular Racing

PLEASE COMMENT ANY VEHICLE YOU WANT ADDED

Lorebook

In progress

---

Scifi Racing Organizations: Scifi Racing uses highly advanced vehicles andis is usually held outside Earth on other colony planets. Only a few events are held on Earth.

The Neo-Formula Network (NFN)

Core Theme / Vibe: Corporate High-Tech League

Vehicles & Key Details Vehicles: "Magnet-Sleds" on city-spanning tubular tracks.

Vibe: Polished, corporate-sponsored, with legal gray zones.

The Chrome Circuit

Core Theme / Vibe: Underground & Illegal Street Racing

Vehicles & Key Details Vehicles: Heavily modded grav-bikes, muscle-hovercars.

Vibe: Gritty, anarchic, ruled by betting and reputation.

The Solar Drift Syndicate

Core Theme / Vibe: Elite Cosmic Rally Racing

Vehicles & Key Details Vehicles: Agile "Drift-Skiffs" navigating asteroid fields.

Vibe: Prestigious, secretive, with ancient alien tech prizes.

The Reaver Rally

Core Theme / Vibe: Post-Apocalyptic & Scavenger Racing

Vehicles & Key Details Vehicles: Armored, jury-rigged "junk-tanks" in blasted wastelands.

Vibe: Brutal, survival-based, sponsored by warlords.

The Axiom Cup

Core Theme / Vibe: VR & Simulated Racing

Vehicles & Key Details Vehicles: Digital consciousness in simulated hyper-cars.

Vibe: Celebrates pure skill; top pilots are "downloaded" for real races.

The Guild of Horizon Chasers

Core Theme / Vibe: Explorer-Adventurer Rally

Vehicles & Key Details Vehicles: Rugged all-terrain "Pathfinder" vessels.

Vibe: Maps unknown hyper-lanes; discovers lost tech and planets.

---

Classic 21st-century Racing Organizations: The Classic 21st-century Racing uses vehicles from year 1970-2030 and using Advanced Technology is highly illegal and frowned upon. Every race is held on Earth.

Metro Night Runners

Core Theme / Vibe: Underground Street Racing Syndicate

Vehicles & Key Details Vehicles: Gritty, illegal street races held in industrial districts or closed highways. Rules are enforced by reputation and betting pools.

The Apex Racing League

Core Theme / Vibe: Corporate-Sponsored Professional Circuit

Vehicles & Key Details Vehicles: High-budget, televised races with factory-backed teams. Intense corporate espionage and engineering rivalry.

The Rustbelt Rally Crew

Core Theme / Vibe: Scrappy Backroad & Off-Road Racing

Vehicles & Key Details Vehicles: Specializes in off-road, desert, or mountain pass rallies. Drivers modify junkers into racing beasts.

Neon Circuit

Core Theme / Vibe: Mixed-Discipline Urban Racing League

Vehicles & Key Details Vehicles: Legal-ish inner-city races mixing cars, motorcycles, and modified vehicles. Favors agility and street knowledge over raw power.

The Midnight Caravan

Core Theme / Vibe: Long-Haul Endurance Racing Collective

Vehicles & Key Details Vehicles: Focuses on extreme endurance races (e.g., cross-continent or 24-hour events). Known for teamwork and mechanical resilience.
creator: Walker_Void2
